instruction: Open System Settings, go to Displays then Night Shift, and turn the manual 'Turn On Until Tomorrow' switch {STATE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 AX-tree, §7); the Night Shift switch state is read from the live AX checkbox value, sidestepping the cfprefsd flush lag a plist read would suffer

args: defaults -currentHost write com.apple.CoreBrightness CBManualEnabled -int {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults -currentHost write com.apple.CoreBrightness CBManualEnabled -int {WANT}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
